select_group: Select a user group on the left to manage
select_group_hint: Select a user group from the top left to get started
select_account_hint: Select an account on the left to browse files
group_desc: User groups define the plugin chain execution logic; accounts are created under user groups
create_plugin_group_desc: Create a new plugin user group to manage plugin chains and accounts
no_accounts: No accounts yet. Add one in the "User Group Management" tab
no_accounts_add: No accounts yet. Click the button above to add one
local_dir_hint: Set the root directory for local file browsing for this account
credential_config_hint: Configure the login credentials for this account
no_login_required_desc: This plugin does not require login credentials and can be used directly
no_credential_needed: This plugin does not require login credentials
click_gear_credential: Click the gear to configure credentials
no_login_method_params: This login method has not declared parameters. Please contact the plugin author.
plugin_chain_order_hint: Ordered from top to bottom; plugins higher up override lower ones with the same capability
no_chain_configured: No plugin chain configured. Click "Edit" to add plugins
plugin_global_config_hint: This configuration applies to all accounts under this user group. Merged automatically at execution (Account Credentials > Route Params > Global Config)
no_config_params: This plugin has not declared configuration parameters
configure_chain_first: Please configure the plugin chain first
missing_plugins: The following plugins are missing; some features may be unavailable
select_group_detail: Select a user group to view details
select_group_detail_hint: Select a user group on the left to manage accounts and plugin chains
select_group_detail_hint2: Select "Local Files" on the left to browse local directories, or create a plugin user group to configure plugin chains
click_plus_create: Click + to create a plugin user group
plugin_group_remote: Plugin User Group - Access remote files via plugins
oshin_desc: OShin is an extensible file management tool
perm_network: Network Access - Allow scripts to make network requests
perm_exec: Execute External Programs - Allow scripts to run external commands
perm_file_read: Read Files - Allow scripts to read local files
perm_file_write: Write Files - Allow scripts to write local files
author: Author:
select_plugin_detail: Select a plugin to view details
test_account_hint: Will use this account's credentials and plugin global config to execute the route
perm_management_desc: Manage permissions granted to plugins. Revoking a permission will require re-authorization when the plugin is executed.
perm_persist_hint: An authorization dialog will appear when a permission is first used. Once granted, permissions are saved persistently and can be revoked at any time from this page.
no_perm_requirements: This plugin has not declared any permission requirements
perm_grant_hint: Granting permission will allow the plugin to perform the corresponding operations. Please make sure you trust this plugin.
global_config_desc: This configuration applies to all accounts using this plugin. It is automatically merged into parameters at execution (Account Credentials > Route Params > Global Config here)
no_config_params_json: This plugin has not declared configuration parameters. You can edit the JSON manually:
dev_mode_warn: In developer mode, all plugins will bypass source verification. Only load plugins you trust.
downloader_global_hint: Global downloader configuration; lower priority than account credentials
default_download_dir_hint: Default save path for downloaded files
plugin_market_hint: Plugin marketplace coming soon. Stay tuned! You'll be able to browse and install verified plugins from the marketplace.
dl_no_tasks_hint: Browse files on the home page and select download; tasks will appear here
qr_scan_prompt: Please scan the QR code with your phone
qr_start_failed: Failed to start QR code login
please_select_group: Please select a user group first
